theme.system.label: System
theme.light.label: Light
theme.dark.label: Dark
modes.intro_suffix: as TOML files. UI edits write there; the hot-reload watcher picks them up. You can also edit the files directly.
modes.no_hotkeys.body_prefix: Global hotkeys are not available here. Use the
modes.no_hotkeys.body_suffix_paste: buttons below — they start/stop recording. The text lands in the clipboard.
modes.no_hotkeys.body_suffix_manual: buttons below — they start/stop recording. The text lands in the clipboard — then press Ctrl+V in the target app.
modes.table.name: Name
autopaste.title: Auto-paste test (diagnostic)
autopaste.intro: Click starts a {seconds}-second countdown. Focus the target window (editor, browser address bar, …) during that time. The text is then injected via clipboard + Ctrl+V — without the audio/STT/LLM pipeline.
autopaste.btn.countdown: Typing in {seconds} s … (focus target window now)
autopaste.status.success: Inject triggered — text should be in the target window.
transcription_test.title: Test transcription
transcription_test.intro: Records {seconds} seconds of audio from the default microphone, transcribes locally with the configured Whisper model, and reports the real-time factor (RTF). RTF < 1 means faster than real time.
settings.hardware.label: Hardware status
settings.hardware.hint: What the app knows about your system. Read-only; based on runtime probing and compile-time feature.
settings.hardware.variant_hint: Tip: A {variant} build could give ~{recommended}× CPU (instead of currently ~{current}×). The Phase-3 bundle matrix will address this.
settings.audio.label: Audio input device
settings.audio.hint: Empty = OS default. Changes take effect on the next recording.
settings.hotkey.wayland.label: Global menu hotkey (Wayland)
settings.hotkey.wayland.hint: On Wayland the compositor (KDE / GNOME) manages the key binding. Changes go under System Settings → Global Shortcuts → VoiceTypeX. The value shown here is the current effective trigger; changes take effect after app restart.
settings.hotkey.label: Global menu hotkey
settings.hotkey.hint: Exactly one hotkey for the whole app. Pressing it opens the mode menu (arrows + Enter); during an active recording the same hotkey stops it. Changes take effect after app restart.
settings.whisper.label: Local Whisper model
settings.whisper.hint: Default slot is downloaded to app_data_dir/models/ on first start. A custom path overrides it.
settings.whisper_threads.label: Whisper threads (local STT)
settings.whisper_threads.hint: Number of CPU threads for Whisper inference. Empty = automatic (CPU cores, max 8). Lower values free the system for parallel work; higher values may be faster.
settings.llm.label: Local LLM model (embedded, default)
settings.llm.hint: GGUF model for the built-in llama-cpp-2 path. Runs without external daemon in the VoiceTypeX process. Default for all modes with processing=local.
settings.llm.slot.gemma4_e4b: Gemma 4 E4B-IT Q5_K_M (~5.1 GB, Pro · 12+ GB RAM · April 2026)
settings.llm.slot.gemma4_e2b: Gemma 4 E2B-IT Q5_K_M (~3.1 GB, Mid · 8–12 GB RAM)
settings.llm.slot.gemma3_1b: Gemma 3 1B-IT Q5_K_M (~851 MB, Light · 4 GB RAM OK)
settings.llm.slot.gemma3_4b: Gemma 3 4B-IT Q5_K_M (~2.8 GB, Legacy Pro · March 2025)
settings.ollama.summary: Ollama configuration (optional, for external daemon use)
settings.ollama.intro_prefix: VoiceTypeX uses the built-in embedded LLM path by default (no external daemon needed). These settings only apply if a mode sets
settings.ollama.intro_suffix: — for example if you run your own Ollama setup on a custom port or with a model that is not available as a GGUF slot.
settings.ollama.endpoint.label: Ollama endpoint
settings.ollama.endpoint.hint: HTTP URL of the Ollama daemon. Standard port is 11434.
settings.ollama.keep_alive.label: Ollama keep-alive
settings.ollama.keep_alive.hint: How long Ollama keeps the model in RAM/VRAM after the last call. Duration string: "5m" (default), "0" for immediate unload, "-1" for unlimited warm.
settings.diagnostic_logging.label: Diagnostic logging
settings.diagnostic_logging.hint: Allows audio metadata, transcripts and LLM responses in the logs. Default OFF (privacy).
settings.autostart.label: Start automatically at login
settings.autostart.hint: Default OFF. The Tauri autostart plugin creates a LaunchAgent or Run entry.
settings.setup_assistant.label: Setup assistant
settings.setup_assistant.hint: If your hardware has changed or you want to run the assistant again.
settings.setup_assistant.confirm:
Run the setup assistant again?

The assistant takes over this window and asks again for the Whisper model, API key and LLM model. Existing settings remain unchanged.
settings.cache.label: Manage cache
settings.cache.hint: Downloaded model files. Delete individually or in bulk. Settings, modes and API keys are not affected.
settings.cache.empty: No files in the model cache yet (created on first download).
settings.cache.confirm_all: Delete all downloaded models? (Whisper, VAD, LLM, partials — will be re-downloaded on next need)
settings.danger.label: Danger zone
settings.danger.hint: Actions that permanently remove user data. Every action asks before executing.
settings.danger.api_keys.title: Delete cloud API keys
settings.danger.api_keys.description: Removes all provider keys from secrets.json and the OS keychain.
settings.danger.api_keys.confirm:
Delete all cloud API keys (xAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Deepgram) from file storage AND OS keychain?

After this you have to re-enter the keys to use cloud providers.
settings.danger.wayland.title: Delete Wayland permission token
settings.danger.wayland.description: Forces the xdg-portal dialog on the next auto-paste. No-op on X11/Windows.
settings.danger.wayland.confirm:
Delete the Wayland permission token?

On the next auto-paste inject the compositor will show the permission dialog again. On X11/Windows this has no effect.
settings.danger.factory.title: Fully reset the app
settings.danger.factory.description: Settings, modes, API keys and Wayland token gone. Models are kept.
settings.danger.factory.confirm:
Fully reset the app?

• Settings → defaults
• Modes → 6 bundled defaults (your own are lost)
• API keys → deleted
• Wayland token → deleted

Downloaded models are kept — delete them separately via cache management.

This step is NOT reversible.
settings.danger.factory.success: App reset to factory settings. Recommendation: restart the app so all in-memory states load fresh.
settings.danger.uninstall_hint_suffix: in the repo or the "Uninstall" section in the README.
api_keys.title: Cloud API keys (BYOK)
api_keys.intro: Keys are stored in the OS keychain, never in plaintext on disk or in logs. The UI only sees whether a key is set.
